Bug / Task Description: closeness_centrality (normalized) returns values scaled slightly too small on connected graphs: every node in a complete graph scores 0.75 instead of 1.0. Rankings are unaffected, so it is easy to miss; the error is in the Wasserman-Faust factor that rescales each node's raw closeness by the fraction of the graph it can reach.
Commit Subject: fix(centrality): normalize closeness by reachable fraction over n-1
